name: Jobs
description: Job management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and managing job instances based on job templates.

request.description:
Create a new job instance based on a job template with an address.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer token in Authorization header)

**Request Body:**
- address (object, optional): street, city, state, postalCode, country, additionalInfo, latitude, longitude

response.name: Create Job - Success
response.body:
{
    "id": 55,
    "jobRef": 1,
    "companyId": 1,
    "templateId": 3,
    "clientId": 1,
    "customerId": 1,
    "assignedWorkerIds": [1],
    "status": "NEW",
    "archived": false,
    "createdAt": "2025-11-14T10:15:00",
    "updatedAt": "2025-11-14T10:15:00",
    "fieldValues": {
        "101": {"name": "customerName", "label": "Customer Name", "type": "TEXT", "value": "John Doe"},
        "102": {"name": "priority", "label": "Priority Level", "type": "DROPDOWN", "value": "Medium"}
    },
    "assetIds": [1, 2],
    "address": {
        "id": 10,
        "street": "123 Main Street",
        "city": "Berlin",
        "state": "Berlin",
        "postalCode": "10115",
        "country": "Germany",
        "additionalInfo": "Near main entrance",
        "latitude": 52.5200,
        "longitude": 13.4050
    }
}

request.description: Retrieve all jobs including their addresses.

response.name: Get All Jobs - Success

request.description: Retrieve a specific job by ID, including its address.

response.name: Get Job by ID - Success

body.raw:

request.description: Update an existing job including its address.

response.name: Update Job - Success
